This option primarily affects disk space usage and potentially the startup time or initialization phase of the application if it needs to manage or clean up these files. However, it does not directly influence the execution time or memory consumption of the core functionality of the "dconverter" software. The performance of the software is more likely to be affected by configurations that directly impact computational complexity, memory allocation, or network communication. Therefore, changing the value of "keepUnoptimizedFilesPostProcessor" would not cause notable variations in execution time or memory consumption during the normal operation of the "dconverter" software.
